'''Jake Thewlis''' (born 24 May 2005) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|wg}}er for [[Warrington Wolves]] in the [[Super League]].

He has spent time on loan from Warrington at [[North Wales Crusaders]] in [[RFL League One]], at [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship]], and at [[Salford Red Devils]] and [[Castleford Tigers]] in the Super League.

==Background==
Thewlis was born in [[Grasscroft]], Oldham, Greater Manchester, England. He was educated at St Edwards' Primary, Lees, and [[St Damian's RC Science College]].<ref>[https://saddind.co.uk/thewlis-brothers-line-up-for-super-league-warrington/ Thewlis brothers line up for Super League Warrington]</ref>

Thewlis played for the [[Waterhead Warriors]] and the [[Saddleworth Rangers]] as a junior.<ref>[https://newstimely.co.uk/jake-thewlis-rugby-league-rising-star-profile/ Jake Thewlis: Rising Rugby League Star with a Bright Future]</ref> He played for [[Lancashire rugby league team|Lancashire]] in the Academy Origin series.<ref>[https://warringtonwolves.com/news/2022/august/8-Academy-graduates-sign-first-team-contracts/ 8 Academy graduates sign first team contracts]</ref>

He is of [[Irish people|Irish]] heritage.<ref>[https://www.warringtonguardian.co.uk/sport/wolves/wolvesnews/25537492.warrington-wolves-stars-named-ireland-squad-face-wales/ Warrington Wolves stars named in Ireland squad to face Wales]</ref>

His brother [[Josh Thewlis (rugby league)|Josh Thewlis]] is a fellow Warrington Wolves player.

==Career==
===Warrington Wolves===
Thewlis was Warrington's reserves player of the year in 2023, as well as playing in that year's academy Grand Final against [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]].<ref>[https://www.alloutrugbyleague.co.uk/news/salford-red-devils-loan-warrington-1092308 Salford Red Devils loan in Warrington Wolves outside-back]</ref>

In 2024, Thewlis made his debut for the [[Warrington Wolves|Wire]] in the [[Super League]] against the [[Wigan Warriors]].<ref>[https://www.salfordreddevils.com/jake-thewlis-joins-salford-red-devils-on-a-month-long-loan/ JAKE THEWLIS JOINS SALFORD RED DEVILS ON A MONTH-LONG LOAN]</ref>

==== Castleford Tigers (loan) ====
On 30 March 2026, [[Castleford Tigers]] announced the arrival of Thewlis on a one-month loan deal, with Warrington holding a recall option.<ref>{{Cite web |date=30 March 2026 |title=Castleford sign Wolves winger Thewlis on loan |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cwykqnj90kgo |access-date=31 March 2026 |website=BBC Sport}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=30 March 2026|author=Bower|title=Castleford Tigers seal deal for Warrington Wolves winger to bolster squad|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/castleford-tigers-sign-warrington-wolves-jake-thewlis|access-date=31 March 2026|first=Aaron}}</ref> He made just one appearance for Castleford before returning to his parent club.<ref name="LRL Forber Thewlis recall">{{Cite web |last=Shaw |first=Matthew |date=5 April 2026 |title=Ryan Carr ready to wield axe on Castleford Tigers 'victims' after latest defeat |url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/ryan-carr-castleford-tigers-victims |access-date=26 May 2026 |website=Love Rugby League}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |last=Turner |first=Matt |date=15 April 2026 |title=Warrington Wolves to recall winger and prop from loan spells |url=https://www.warringtonguardian.co.uk/sport/wolves/wolvesnews/26024580.warrington-wolves-recall-winger-prop-loan-spells/ |access-date=26 May 2026 |website=Warrington Guardian}}</ref>
